TOKEN_PRESETS.Manager.title: Token Presets
TOKEN_PRESETS.Manager.empty: No presets yet. Click "New Preset" to create one.
TOKEN_PRESETS.Manager.applyDefaults: Apply Foundry defaults to this preset
TOKEN_PRESETS.Manager.applyDefaultsConfi: Overwrite the field values of preset "{name}" with the Foundry defaults? Existing values for this preset will be lost.
TOKEN_PRESETS.Manager.deleteConfirm: Delete preset "{name}"? This cannot be undone.
TOKEN_PRESETS.Menu.presetManager.name: Token Default Presets
TOKEN_PRESETS.Menu.presetManager.label: Manage / create Presets
TOKEN_PRESETS.Menu.presetManager.hint: Create and edit token presets to apply when actors are placed on a scene.
TOKEN_PRESETS.Picker.title: Token Preset
TOKEN_PRESETS.Picker.promptNew: Choose a token preset to apply when this actor is placed on a scene.
TOKEN_PRESETS.Picker.promptExisting: Choose a token preset for "{name}". Future placements will use the selected preset.
TOKEN_PRESETS.Picker.promptFolder: Choose a token preset to apply to {count} actor(s) in "{name}".
TOKEN_PRESETS.MultiPicker.title: Apply Token Preset
TOKEN_PRESETS.MultiPicker.tokensLabel: List of Tokens already on the Canvas
TOKEN_PRESETS.MultiPicker.hint: Ctrl-click or Shift-click for multi-select. Ctrl+A selects all.
TOKEN_PRESETS.MultiPicker.noTokens: There are no tokens on this scene to apply a preset to.
TOKEN_PRESETS.MultiPicker.noTokensSelect: Select one or more tokens in the dialog before applying.
TOKEN_PRESETS.Picker.label: Select Your Preset -->
TOKEN_PRESETS.Picker.noPresets: No token presets configured. Open Module Settings → Manage / create Presets to create one.
TOKEN_PRESETS.Context.setFolderPreset: Set Token Preset for All Actors…
TOKEN_PRESETS.Landing.title: Token Presets
TOKEN_PRESETS.LiveEdit.title: Edit Selected Tokens
TOKEN_PRESETS.LiveEdit.noSelection: Select one or more tokens on the canvas first, then try again.
TOKEN_PRESETS.LiveEdit.confirmMessage: Apply these changes to {count} token(s)? Cancelling will revert the preview.
TOKEN_PRESETS.LiveEdit.applyFailed: Failed to apply changes. Check the console for details.
TOKEN_PRESETS.LiveEdit.targetingTokenSin: selected token. Fields where the tokens differ show as “Mixed”; only fields you change get written.
TOKEN_PRESETS.LiveEdit.targetingTokenPlu: selected tokens. Fields where the tokens differ show as “Mixed”; only fields you change get written.
TOKEN_PRESETS.TagActors.title: Tag Actors with a Preset
TOKEN_PRESETS.TagActors.actorsLabel: Actors (current tag shown after the name)
TOKEN_PRESETS.TagActors.hint: Ctrl-click or Shift-click for multi-select. Ctrl+A selects all.
TOKEN_PRESETS.TagActors.noActorsSelected: Select one or more actors before applying.
TOKEN_PRESETS.TokenFilter.label: Filter Tokens using the options below
TOKEN_PRESETS.Push.confirmActor: Apply preset "{preset}" to {count} placed token(s) of "{actor}"?
TOKEN_PRESETS.Push.confirmFolder: Apply tagged presets to {count} placed token(s) across folder "{folder}"? ({summary})
TOKEN_PRESETS.Push.note: This overwrites the listed fields on existing token placements. Previous values are saved per-token so a future undo can restore them.
TOKEN_PRESETS.Push.noFlag: This actor has no preset assigned. Use "Set Token Preset…" first.
TOKEN_PRESETS.Push.presetMissing: The actor's assigned preset no longer exists.
TOKEN_PRESETS.Push.noPlacements: No placed tokens reference this actor.
TOKEN_PRESETS.Push.folderNoFlags: No actors in this folder have a preset assigned.
TOKEN_PRESETS.Push.noSelection: Select one or more tokens on the canvas first.
TOKEN_PRESETS.Folder.note: This affects future token placements only. Tokens already placed on scenes are not changed.
TOKEN_PRESETS.Field.ringSubjectTextureHi: Explicitly specify a path for the artwork placed over the dynamic token ring. If not provided, the ring subject is the same as the standard token texture.
TOKEN_PRESETS.Section.visionHint: Heads up: if another module also manages token vision (vision overhauls, lighting suites, etc.) its behaviour may override these values.
